/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/X:THE CO-DEFENDANT'S ORAL MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE IS GRANTED,/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BEPLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILLPLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/NTW60/LDPX:02-08-22/CONTD:SETTING/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW, NTW60, STWPX, (DELETE NON-APPLICABLE ABBREVIATION)/LDPX:12-27-21/X:THE 60TH LAST DAY IS02-08-22/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH AGPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTHON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER ACOORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/WS/X:DEFENDANT MUST SUBMIT TO A DRUG TEST WHEN DIRECTED TO DO SO BY SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE//X:DEFENDANT SHALL NOT POSSESS ANY WEAPONS/X:DEFENDANT SHALL REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN INTERIOR OF RESIDENCE(HOME DETENTION)UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY A SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE/SA2:6609 3RD STREET AND 1025 LECONTE AVE,,S,F,,CA/SAORD3/SAORD/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:  TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING (TE 4 HRS)/DOP/
